/user.raw_response:
{
  "positive": [
    {
      "name": "Get user with valid ID",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": {"id": "12345"},
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve user with valid ID"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user with email",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": {"email": "test@example.com"},
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve user with email"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user with username",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": {"username": "testuser"},
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve user with username"
    }
  ],
  "negative": [
    {
      "name": "Get user with invalid ID",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": {"id": " invalid_id"},
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Retrieve user with invalid ID"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user with non-existent email",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": {"email": "nonexistent@example.com"},
      "expected_status": 404,
      "description": "Retrieve user with non-existent email"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user with empty query parameters",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": {},
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Retrieve user with empty query parameters"
    }
  ],
  "boundary": [
    {
      "name": "Get user with very long ID",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": {"id": "a".repeat(100)},
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve user with very long ID"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user with null query parameters",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user",
      "query_params": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Retrieve user with null query parameters"
    }
  ]
}

/user/login.raw_response:
{
  "positive": [
    {
      "name": "Valid login with username and password",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"username": "testuser", "password": "testpassword"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Successful login with valid credentials"
    },
    {
      "name": "Valid login with username only",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"username": "testuser"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Successful login with valid username"
    },
    {
      "name": "Valid login with password only",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"password": "testpassword"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Successful login with valid password"
    }
  ],
  "negative": [
    {
      "name": "Invalid login with missing username",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"password": "testpassword"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Failed login with missing username"
    },
    {
      "name": "Invalid login with missing password",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"username": "testuser"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Failed login with missing password"
    },
    {
      "name": "Invalid login with empty credentials",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"username": "", "password": ""},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Failed login with empty credentials"
    }
  ],
  "boundary": [
    {
      "name": "Long username and password",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"username": "a".repeat(100), "password": "b".repeat(100)},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Successful login with long credentials"
    },
    {
      "name": "Empty string username and password",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/login",
      "query_params": {"username": "", "password": ""},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Failed login with empty string credentials"
    }
  ]
}

/user/{username}.raw_response:
{
  "positive": [
    {
      "name": "Get user by valid username",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": "user1"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by valid username"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user by another valid username",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": "testuser"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by another valid username"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user by username with special characters",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": "user!@#$"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by username with special characters"
    }
  ],
  "negative": [
    {
      "name": "Get user by empty username",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": ""},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by empty username should fail"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user by null username",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": null},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by null username should fail"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user by very long username",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": "a".repeat(100)},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 400,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by very long username should fail"
    }
  ],
  "boundary": [
    {
      "name": "Get user by username with leading spaces",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": "  user1"},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by username with leading spaces"
    },
    {
      "name": "Get user by username with trailing spaces",
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/user/{username}",
      "path_params": {"username": "user1  "},
      "payload": null,
      "expected_status": 200,
      "description": "Retrieve existing user by username with trailing spaces"
    }
  ]
}
